name: Nomi Igisa

appearance.hair: White. Fine and straight. Falls loosely.
appearance.build: Small and slight. The appearance of fragility. Not fragile.
appearance.other: Very pale skin, dark eyes. In motion her eyes go slightly unfocused when she's actively using Poltergeist — she's watching the objects, not you.

personality.summary: Timid in new situations and quiet as a default. Somehow best friends with Yoshibara Hiyoko, who is neither of those things. They balance each other precisely: Hiyoko fills the space Nomi leaves; Nomi provides the stillness Hiyoko doesn't have. Their friendship makes complete sense if you see it operating.
personality.in_class: Listens carefully. Speaks rarely. When she speaks, people listen because it doesn't happen often.
personality.in_combat: Eerie. She looks calm while objects orbit and launch around her. Her telekinesis is quiet — she doesn't narrate it.
personality.quirk_of_character: Small objects near her sometimes drift toward her slightly without her intending it — a pen rolling half an inch on a desk, a cup shifting. She doesn't notice.

ability_scores.note: WIS primary (Poltergeist is telekinesis — mental/control type, governed by perception and focus). INT secondary for precision.

class_note: Quirk Savant's expanded quirk use lets her maintain more simultaneous telekinetic effects.

quirk_mechanics.weakness: Max weight controllable: ~275 lbs (approximately one person). High stamina drain. Number of simultaneously controlled objects = proficiency bonus.

abilities.name: Object Barrage
abilities.description: Telekinetically launch a barrage of small objects in a 40-foot cone. DEX save vs Quirk DC. Fail: 4d6 bludgeoning damage, knocked back 20 ft. Success: half damage, no knockback.

abilities.name: Telekinetic Push or Pull
abilities.description: Target one creature or two objects within 30 feet and move forcefully. Objects: instantly move up to 30 ft. Creatures: STR save vs Quirk DC. Fail: pushed/pulled 40 ft, 2d6 force damage, restrained or prone 10 ft in the air. Success: pushed/pulled 20 ft, half damage, no condition.

abilities.name: Telekinetic Shield
abilities.description: Create a swirling 10-foot radius barrier of telekinetically controlled debris centered on self or up to two allies within 30 ft. Barrier has 20 HP, grants +1 AC to creatures inside. Enemies cannot enter while active. Friendly creatures can move out freely.

dm_notes.combat_role: Area denial and creature repositioning. She moves enemies into bad positions and allies into good ones. Doesn't deal high damage but makes everyone else's damage land better.
dm_notes.social_role: The class's quiet conscience. She notices things others miss but communicates them only in small ways — a look, a sentence. People who pay attention to her learn to pay more attention.
dm_notes.growth_arc: Finding her voice. Not metaphorically — literally saying the thing she noticed. Her relationship with Hiyoko is the model: she's seen how much space another person takes, and the class is going to need her to take some.
dm_notes.weakness_to_exploit: Low STR and CON. She is physically fragile. Any enemy that ignores the orbiting debris and goes directly at her will find someone who cannot survive a close-range fight.
